feed.description: Scuba diving stories and skills: safety, marine life, travel, and calm thinking underwater.
feed.title: Below the Surface

bullets:
# Below the Surface — Episode
## Marine Biology for Divers
Host: Rina
Guest: Hanna
Rina: Welcome back to Below the Surface.
Today we're talking about marine biology, and I'm joined by Hanna, marine biologist focused on reef systems.
This episode is brought to you by PADI.
